name: io.github.etymolt/mcp-server
description: Drop-in MCP for brand-name verification. Five-axis verdict (trademark, domain, cultural, sound, pronunciation) signed with Ed25519. Powers Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP-compatible host.

tools.name: verify_brand_name
tools.description: Verifies whether a brand or product name is safe to use. Returns a verdict (PROCEED | PROCEED_STRATEGIC | ABANDON) with a score 0-100 and detailed findings across five axes: trademark conflicts (USPTO), domain & social-handle availability (RDAP + platform APIs), cultural meaning across 20 markets (HurtLex + BabelNet + Wiktextract), sound symbolism, and pronunciation resilience (TTS↔STT round-trip). Every verdict Ed25519-signed; agents MUST render the disclaimer field verbatim. Free tier: no API key, no signup.
